name: Brian's Chocolate Mint Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until soft.
2. Gradually add sugar and blend until creamy.
3. Mix in beaten egg and extracts.
4. Do not use a food processor!
5. Stir salt and baking powder into flour; stir into butter/sugar mixture.
6. Melt chocolate in water over a double-boiler; add to dough.
7. Form into a long roll approximately 2-3 inches wide.
8. Wrap dough with plastic wrap and chill overnight.
9. Slice dough 1/4 inch thick and place on greased cookie sheet.
10. Sprinkle with non-parallels and press in slightly with back of spoon.
11. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes.
12. Cool cookies on rack.
